description:
Try Higgsfield's new MCP Tool for FREE Today - https://higgsfield.ai/s/mcp-austin.marchese-naMdfi

In this video, I break down 9 Claude Code plugins that help you build 10x faster and save money in the process. These are the exact plugins I use to cut AI slop, extend Claude with web scraping and media generation, swap models on the fly, and see where my $1,800 in token spend is actually going. Don't install all 9, or do. But make sure to pick the ones that fit what you need today.

(0:00) - Plugin #1
(0:51) - Plugin #2
(3:20) - Plugin #3
(4:43) - Plugin #4
(6:20) - Plugin #5
(7:55) - Plugin #6
(9:41) - Plugin #7
(10:58) - Plugin #8
(12:54) - Plugin #9

--------
FOR INDIVIDUALS:
- Try Higgsfield's new MCP Tool for FREE Today - https://higgsfield.ai/s/mcp-austin.marchese-naMdfi

- Use BuildPartner to build 10x faster with Claude Code (try free): https://buildpartner.ai/cc9

FOR BUSINESSES, Ways to work with me:
- Want AI systems built into your operations? https://theincubator.xyz/ops/cc9
- Want to build a SaaS product without hiring a CTO? https://www.theincubator.xyz/eng/cc9
--------

If you're new here, I'm Austin Marchese. How I got here...
16: First business (SAT Math Tutor)
22: Graduated Stevens Tech, 4.0, College Basketball, software engineering job at JPM
23: Bitcoin ATM company + building algorithms for a professional gambler (fun story)
24: Started creating content, grew 100k+ followers, built first agency, The Incubator
25: Scaled agency to 15+ team members, $75K/M while working full time
26: Quit my job, joined a startup called IYK
27: Became COO of a $25M+ tech startup, worked with Ed Sheeran, Chance the Rapper and more
28: Built a $20M+ real estate portfolio in the background
29: Transitioned from IYK, re-launched The Incubator, grew it to a 6-figure biz in 30 days. Now building BuildPartner.ai

To everyone who's spending time learning and putting the work in, cheers. Anyone can make comments from the sidelines but not everyone can build...

- Austin
